description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton featuring the Faragello brand, predominantly colored in blue with vibrant orange slices depicted on the front and sides, indicating an orange juice flavor. The front panel displays the brand name in bold red and white, with the product name 'ORANGE PREMIUM DRINK' in large white and blue letters. The packaging includes a detailed nutritional information panel on one side and multilingual product information on the other. The top of the carton is flat and sealed, with no visible cap or straw opening. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed to attract attention in a retail or urban environment.
description: A blue rectangular Faragello orange juice carton with orange slice graphics and bold branding, featuring nutritional and product information on the sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Faragello logo, orange slice graphics, and 'ORANGE BOISSON PREMIUM' text.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the nutritional information panel in English and French.
description_view_2: Alternate front view with similar branding and graphics as view 0, but with 'PREMIUM DRINK' text.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing multilingual product details, recycling symbols, and barcode.
